# Bit Manipulation → Test and Fill

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Bit Manipulation → Test and Fill

Test and Fill

Instruction Type and Width        Instruction description
                                  Performs fill destination with two byte constant values from a
Vector Test and Fill Bytes        common register source. The destination is either 32-bit or 40-
                                  bit wide determined by the register type.
                                  Performs fill destination with two word constant values from a
Vector Test and Fill Words        common register source. The destination is either 32-bit or 40-
                                  bit wide determined by the register type.
